revision.text:
{{moved from|Tenkei Okyōsho}} In September 1965, Ōnishi Tama composed '''''Tenkei Mikyōsho''''' ([[q:ja:大西玉#天啓御教書|天啓御教書]], "Book of Divine Revelations"), a 100-line poem explaining the core doctrines of the Honbushin religion. The poem is published in ''Uchū Hontairon'' (宇宙本体論, "Origin of the Universe"), a 1994 book that gives an overview of Honbushin beliefs. The "Overview" (総序) section, which is the book's first section, was written by Ōnishi Tama in June 1961; the third section of the book (すくい綱) was written by her in July 1964.<ref>Miroku みろく [Ōnishi Tama 大西玉] (1994-04-26). ''Uchū Hontairon'' 宇宙本体論. Plus One プラスワン出版社. ISBN 4-938753-90-1.</ref>
==Original text== (南無甘露台)
*物極不滅は神完全 ::陰陽自存の大精神 :宇宙の極は心のみ ::神独創の世の起源 :継続体系とり進む ::陰陽電気の力業
*真の自由は現実に ::根元自在の二神のみ :神はすべての因なりて ::われらの住居は結果境 :神人それぞれ本質は ::能動受動の電気にて :常にわれらは依存した ::力と力の対心形
*秩序は完全組織なリ ::万象すべては神の意志 :進化の歴史の指すところ ::神に目的ある証拠 :神の目的神中心 ::真の宗教羅針盤 :完全和合の西世界 ::神の理想の反射鏡
*人間理性の真意義は ::神の理想の理解なり :善悪是非の判別も ::神目的が正基準 :人生意義はここにあり ::建設努力が人の義務
*神こそわれらの真の父母 ::進化過程は根元に :われら育てる親心 ::示せる神の完全愛 :万差のわれら境遇は ::霊魂不減の証左なり
*心は霊の活動態 ::生とは新の旅にして :各自に応じた続き道 ::生活体の死の崩壊 :神訓育の中休み ::次生に備えた衣裳替え :すべては借物自体は無 ::刹那連続反応態
*運命宿命神の意図 ::知らでも目的コース行く :生死浮沈もことごとく ::各自を仕込む仕組みにて :神目的の部品なり ::神おもわくの個性づくり :人力無なり死が正体 ::心だけなる神の守護
*神の世界は理の支配 ::環境いっさい天の声 :目的物の全人間 ::互いに鏡で映り合う :自己が行為はみな還る ::善悪因果の訓育法 :神の摂理は完全綱 ::水も漏らさぬ理の裁き
*神は完全終始無し ::神の性格天理なり :天理に基づく理の指針 ::神の手段は神の価値 :全哲証拠神の型 ::いかなるものも破壊不可 :現象界に終始して ::神本質を知らざるの :枝の教えは道すがら ::根を知るまでの段階期
*開闢以来の天啓道 ::世界最後の元の声 :天祖の教えは全哲理 ::神目的の証拠道 :すべてに神の型示す ::予言満載着実に :旬に応じた的中を ::示す尊き理のふしん
*惨たり道の沿革史 ::苦難が実る黎明期 :ひながた踏んだほんぶしん ::死灰で死滅の世直しに :既成の殻を打ち破る ::神おもわくの正解教
*道人没我でひのきしん ::神の世ゆえに神一条 :意義にめざめた正人間 ::熱誠貫く神の使者 :天理の大道打ち出して ::正当教理で世に先駆 :世にも珍し助けなす ::神宿望の到達期
*理想実現初代には ::神代初めの基盤なる :みろくぼさつの完全教 ::元のふしんのみろくの世 :つとめの目当は甘露台 ::南無全世界済渡する
*不滅教えの発光体 ::神名代の元親本尊 :一れつ助けの元の親 ::全人類の真の親里
==Intelinear English translation== (Google Gemini 2.5 Pro translation; please check for errors and improvements)
;天啓御教書 :''Tenkei Mikyōsho'' :"The Revelatory Divine Teachings"
:物極不滅は神完全 :Butsu kyoku fu-metsu wa Kami kanzen :That which reaches the ultimate and does not perish is God's perfection
:陰陽自存の大精神 :In'yō jizon no dai-seishin :The great spirit of the self-existing yin and yang
:宇宙の極は心のみ :Uchū no kyoku wa kokoro nomi :The ultimate of the universe is only the mind/heart
:神独創の世の起源 :Kami dokusō no yo no kigen :The origin of the world is God's sole creation
:継続体系とり進む :Keizoku taikei tori susumu :Proceeding by means of a continuous system
:陰陽電気の力業 :In'yō denki no chikarawaza :The mighty work of the electricity of yin and yang
:真の自由は現実に :Shin no jiyū wa genjitsu ni :True freedom, in reality,
:根元自在の二神のみ :Kongen jizai no ni-shin nomi :Belongs only to the two gods of the origin, who are completely free
:神はすべての因なりて :Kami wa subete no in narite :God is the cause of all, and
:われらの住居は結果境 :Warera no suma-i wa kekka-kyō :Our dwelling is the realm of effect
:神人それぞれ本質は :Kami-hito sorezore honshitsu wa :The essence of God and humans, respectively, is
:能動受動の電気にて :Nōdō judō no denki nite :The electricity of activeness and passiveness
:常にわれらは依存した :Tsune ni warera wa izon shita :We have always been dependent
:力と力の対心形 :Chikara to chikara no tai-shin-kei :On the opposing forms of power and power
:秩序は完全組織なリ :Chitsujo wa kanzen soshiki nari :Order is a perfect system
:万象すべては神の意志 :Banshō subete wa Kami no ishi :All phenomena are the will of God
:進化の歴史の指すところ :Shinka no rekishi no sasu tokoro :What the history of evolution points to
:神に目的ある証拠 :Kami ni mokuteki aru shōko :Is proof that God has a purpose
:神の目的神中心 :Kami no mokuteki Kami chūshin :God's purpose is God-centered
:真の宗教羅針盤 :Shin no shūkyō rashinban :The compass of true religion
:完全和合の西世界 :Kanzen wagō no nishi-sekai :The Western world of perfect harmony
:神の理想の反射鏡 :Kami no risō no hanshakyō :Is the reflecting mirror of God's ideal
:人間理性の真意義は :Ningen risei no shin'igi wa :The true meaning of human reason
:神の理想の理解なり :Kami no risō no rikai nari :Is the understanding of God's ideal
:善悪是非の判別も :Zen'aku zehi no hanbetsu mo :The discernment of good and evil, right and wrong,
:神目的が正基準 :Kami-mokuteki ga sei-kijun :Has God's purpose as its correct standard
:人生意義はここにあり :Jinsei igi wa koko ni ari :The meaning of life is here
:建設努力が人の義務 :Kensetsu doryoku ga hito no gimu :The effort of construction is the duty of man
:神こそわれらの真の父母 :Kami koso warera no shin no fubo :God is our true parent
:進化過程は根元に :Shinka katei wa kongen ni :The process of evolution, at its root,
:われら育てる親心 :Warera sodateru oya-gokoro :Is the parental heart that nurtures us
:示せる神の完全愛 :Shimeseru Kami no kanzen-ai :The manifested perfect love of God
:万差のわれら境遇は :Bansa no warera kyōgū wa :Our myriad different circumstances
:霊魂不減の証左なり :Reikon fu-metsu no shōsa nari :Are proof of the indestructibility of the soul
:心は霊の活動態 :Kokoro wa rei no katsudō-tai :The mind is the active state of the spirit
:生とは新の旅にして :Sei to wa kokoro no tabi ni shite :Life is a new journey
:各自に応じた続き道 :Kakuji ni ōjita tsuzuki-michi :A continuous path according to each individual
:生活体の死の崩壊 :Seikatsu-tai no shi no hōkai :The collapse of the living body at death
:神訓育の中休み :Kami kun'iku no nakayasumi :Is a brief rest in God's training
:次生に備えた衣裳替え :Jisei ni sonaeta ishōgae :A change of clothes in preparation for the next life
:すべては借物自体は無 :Subete wa karimono jitai wa mu :Everything is a borrowed thing; in itself, it is nothing
:刹那連続反応態 :Setsuna renzoku hannō-tai :A continuous state of momentary reactions
:運命宿命神の意図 :Unmei shukumei Kami no ito :Fate and destiny are God's intention
:知らでも目的コース行く :Shirade mo mokuteki kōsu yuku :Even without knowing it, we follow the course of purpose
:生死浮沈もことごとく :Seishi fuchin mo kotogotoku :Life and death, ups and downs, all of it
:各自を仕込む仕組みにて :Kakuji o shikomu shikumi nite :Is a mechanism for training each individual
:神目的の部品なり :Kami-mokuteki no buhin nari :We are parts of God's purpose
:神おもわくの個性づくり :Kami omowaku no saga-zukuri :The creation of individuality according to God's will
:人力無なり死が正体 :Jinryoku mu nari shi ga shōtai :Human power is nothing; death is its true nature
:心だけなる神の守護 :Kokoro dake naru Kami no shugo :Only the mind/heart is God's protection
:神の世界は理の支配 :Kami no sekai wa ri no shihai :The world of God is the dominion of reason/principle
:環境いっさい天の声 :Kankyō issai Ten no koe :The entire environment is the voice of Heaven
:目的物の全人間 :Mokuteki-butsu no zen-ningen :All human beings, the objects of the purpose
:互いに鏡で映り合う :Tagai ni kagami de utsuri-au :Reflect each other in a mirror
:自己が行為はみな還る :Ono ga kōi wa mina kaeru :One's own actions all return
:善悪因果の訓育法 :Zen'aku inga no kun'iku-hō :The training method of cause and effect of good and evil
:神の摂理は完全綱 :Kami no setsuri wa kanzen-mō :God's providence is a perfect web
:水も漏らさぬ理の裁き :Mizu mo morasanu ri no sabaki :The judgment of principle that lets no water leak
:神は完全終始無し :Kami wa kanzen shūshi nashi :God is perfect, without beginning or end
:神の性格天理なり :Kami no seikaku Tenri nari :The nature of God is Heavenly Principle
:天理に基づく理の指針 :Tenri ni motozuku ri no shishin :The guidance of principle based on Heavenly Principle
:神の手段は神の価値 :Kami no tedate wa Kami no kachi :God's means are God's values
:全哲証拠神の型 :Zen-tetsu shōko Kami no kata :The proof of all philosophy is the model of God
:いかなるものも破壊不可 :Ikanaru mono mo hakai fuka :Which cannot be destroyed by anything
:現象界に終始して :Genshō-kai ni shūshi shite :To be engrossed in the phenomenal world
:神本質を知らざるの :Kami-honshitsu o shirazaru no :And not know the essence of God
:枝の教えは道すがら :Eda no oshie wa michisugara :The teachings of the branches are on the way
:根を知るまでの段階期 :Ne o shiru made no dankai-ki :A stage until one knows the root
:開闢以来の天啓道 :Kaibyaku irai no tenkei-dō :The way of revelation since the beginning of the world
:世界最後の元の声 :Sekai saigo no moto no koe :Is the final, original voice of the world
:天祖の教えは全哲理 :Tenso no oshie wa zen-tetsuri :The teaching of the Heavenly Ancestor is the entire philosophy
:神目的の証拠道 :Kami-mokuteki no shōko-michi :The way of proof of God's purpose
:すべてに神の型示す :Subete ni Kami no kata shimesu :In all things, the model of God is shown
:予言満載着実に :Yogen mansai chakujitsu ni :Steadily loaded with prophecies
:旬に応じた的中を :Shun ni ōjita tekichū o :Hitting the mark according to the right time
:示す尊き理のふしん :Shimesu tōtoki ri no fushin :Is the precious construction of principle that is shown
:惨たり道の沿革史 :San tari michi no enkaku-shi :The tragic history of the path
:苦難が実る黎明期 :Kunan ga minoru reimei-ki :Is the dawn when hardship bears fruit
:ひながた踏んだほんぶしん :Hinagata funda hon-bushin :The true construction that has followed the divine model
:死灰で死滅の世直しに :Shikai de shimetsu no yonaoshi ni :For the world-renewal from dead ashes
:既成の殻を打ち破る :Kisei no kara o uchiyaburu :Breaking the shell of the established order
:神おもわくの正解教 :Kami omowaku no seikai-kyō :Is the correct teaching of God's will
:道人没我でひのきしん :Michi-bito botsuga de hinokishin :The followers of the path, in selflessness, perform daily service
:神の世ゆえに神一条 :Kami no yo yue ni Kami ichijō :Because it is the world of God, it is God in a single line
:意義にめざめた正人間 :Igi ni mezameta sei-ningen :The true human being awakened to the meaning
:熱誠貫く神の使者 :Nessei tsuranuku Kami no shisha :Is a messenger of God who carries through with sincerity
:天理の大道打ち出して :Tenri no daidō uchidashite :Putting forth the great path of Heavenly Principle
:正当教理で世に先駆 :Seitō kyōri de yo ni senku :Pioneering the world with orthodox doctrine
:世にも珍し助けなす :Yo ni mo mezurashi tasuke nasu :Performing salvation, which is rare in the world
:神宿望の到達期 :Kami shukubō no tōtatsu-ki :Is the period of arrival of God's long-cherished desire
:理想実現初代には :Risō jitsugen shodai ni wa :In the first generation of the realization of the ideal
:神代初めの基盤なる :Kami-yo hajime no kiban naru :Is the foundation of the beginning of the age of the gods
:みろくぼさつの完全教 :Miroku Bosatsu no kanzen-kyō :The perfect teaching of Miroku Bosatsu (Maitreya Bodhisattva)
:元のふしんのみろくの世 :Moto no fushin no Miroku no yo :Is the world of Miroku of the original construction
:つとめの目当は甘露台 :Tsutome no medo wa Kanrodai :The aim of the service is the Kanrodai
:南無全世界済渡する :Namu zensekai saido suru :Adoration, saving the entire world
:不滅教えの発光体 :Fumetsu oshie no hakkō-tai :The luminous body of the immortal teaching
:神名代の元親本尊 :Kami myōdai no jiba-honzon :Is the original parent, the object of worship, the representative of God
:一れつ助けの元の親 :Ichiretsu tasuke no moto no oya :The original parent of the salvation of all
:全人類の真の親里 :Zen-jinrui no shin no sato :The true parental home of all humanity

{{moved from|Tenkei Okyōsho}} In September 1965, Ōnishi Tama composed '''''Tenkei Mikyōsho''''' ([[q:ja:大西玉#天啓御教書|天啓御教書]], "Book of Divine Revelations"), a 100-line poem explaining the core doctrines of the Honbushin religion. The poem is published in ''Uchū Hontairon'' (宇宙本体論, "Origin of the Universe"), a 1994 book that gives an overview of Honbushin beliefs. The "Overview" (総序) section, which is the book's first section, was written by Ōnishi Tama in June 1961; the third section of the book (すくい綱) was written by her in July 1964.<ref>Miroku みろく [Ōnishi Tama 大西玉] (1994-04-26). ''Uchū Hontairon'' 宇宙本体論. Plus One プラスワン出版社. ISBN 4-938753-90-1.</ref>

*神の世界は理の支配 ::環境いっさい天の声 :目的物の全人間 ::互いに鏡で映り合う :自己が行為はみな還る ::善悪因果の訓育法 :神の摂理は完全綱 ::水も漏らさぬ理の裁き
*神は完全終始無し ::神の性格天理なり :天理に基づく理の指針 ::神の手段は神の価値 :全哲証拠神の型 ::いかなるものも破壊不可 :現象界に終始して ::神本質を知らざるの :枝の教えは道すがら ::根を知るまでの段階期
*開闢以来の天啓道 ::世界最後の元の声 :天祖の教えは全哲理 ::神目的の証拠道 :すべてに神の型示す ::予言満載着実に :旬に応じた的中を ::示す尊き理のふしん

:進化過程は根元に :Shinka katei wa kongen ni :The process of evolution, at its root,
:われら育てる親心 :Warera sodateru oya-gokoro :Is the parental heart that nurtures us
:示せる神の完全愛 :Shimeseru Kami no kanzen-ai :The manifested perfect love of God
:万差のわれら境遇は :Bansa no warera kyōgū wa :Our myriad different circumstances
:霊魂不減の証左なり :Reikon fu-metsu no shōsa nari :Are proof of the indestructibility of the soul
:心は霊の活動態 :Kokoro wa rei no katsudō-tai :The mind is the active state of the spirit
:生とは新の旅にして :Sei to wa kokoro no tabi ni shite :Life is a new journey
:各自に応じた続き道 :Kakuji ni ōjita tsuzuki-michi :A continuous path according to each individual
:生活体の死の崩壊 :Seikatsu-tai no shi no hōkai :The collapse of the living body at death
:神訓育の中休み :Kami kun'iku no nakayasumi :Is a brief rest in God's training
:次生に備えた衣裳替え :Jisei ni sonaeta ishōgae :A change of clothes in preparation for the next life
:すべては借物自体は無 :Subete wa karimono jitai wa mu :Everything is a borrowed thing; in itself, it is nothing
:刹那連続反応態 :Setsuna renzoku hannō-tai :A continuous state of momentary reactions
:運命宿命神の意図 :Unmei shukumei Kami no ito :Fate and destiny are God's intention
:知らでも目的コース行く :Shirade mo mokuteki kōsu yuku :Even without knowing it, we follow the course of purpose
:生死浮沈もことごとく :Seishi fuchin mo kotogotoku :Life and death, ups and downs, all of it
:各自を仕込む仕組みにて :Kakuji o shikomu shikumi nite :Is a mechanism for training each individual
:神目的の部品なり :Kami-mokuteki no buhin nari :We are parts of God's purpose
:神おもわくの個性づくり :Kami omowaku no saga-zukuri :The creation of individuality according to God's will
:人力無なり死が正体 :Jinryoku mu nari shi ga shōtai :Human power is nothing; death is its true nature
:心だけなる神の守護 :Kokoro dake naru Kami no shugo :Only the mind/heart is God's protection
:神の世界は理の支配 :Kami no sekai wa ri no shihai :The world of God is the dominion of reason/principle
:環境いっさい天の声 :Kankyō issai Ten no koe :The entire environment is the voice of Heaven
:目的物の全人間 :Mokuteki-butsu no zen-ningen :All human beings, the objects of the purpose
:互いに鏡で映り合う :Tagai ni kagami de utsuri-au :Reflect each other in a mirror
:自己が行為はみな還る :Ono ga kōi wa mina kaeru :One's own actions all return
:善悪因果の訓育法 :Zen'aku inga no kun'iku-hō :The training method of cause and effect of good and evil
:神の摂理は完全綱 :Kami no setsuri wa kanzen-mō :God's providence is a perfect web
:水も漏らさぬ理の裁き :Mizu mo morasanu ri no sabaki :The judgment of principle that lets no water leak
:神は完全終始無し :Kami wa kanzen shūshi nashi :God is perfect, without beginning or end
:神の性格天理なり :Kami no seikaku Tenri nari :The nature of God is Heavenly Principle
:天理に基づく理の指針 :Tenri ni motozuku ri no shishin :The guidance of principle based on Heavenly Principle
:神の手段は神の価値 :Kami no tedate wa Kami no kachi :God's means are God's values
:全哲証拠神の型 :Zen-tetsu shōko Kami no kata :The proof of all philosophy is the model of God
:いかなるものも破壊不可 :Ikanaru mono mo hakai fuka :Which cannot be destroyed by anything
:現象界に終始して :Genshō-kai ni shūshi shite :To be engrossed in the phenomenal world
:神本質を知らざるの :Kami-honshitsu o shirazaru no :And not know the essence of God
:枝の教えは道すがら :Eda no oshie wa michisugara :The teachings of the branches are on the way
:根を知るまでの段階期 :Ne o shiru made no dankai-ki :A stage until one knows the root
:開闢以来の天啓道 :Kaibyaku irai no tenkei-dō :The way of revelation since the beginning of the world
:世界最後の元の声 :Sekai saigo no moto no koe :Is the final, original voice of the world
:天祖の教えは全哲理 :Tenso no oshie wa zen-tetsuri :The teaching of the Heavenly Ancestor is the entire philosophy
:神目的の証拠道 :Kami-mokuteki no shōko-michi :The way of proof of God's purpose
:すべてに神の型示す :Subete ni Kami no kata shimesu :In all things, the model of God is shown
:予言満載着実に :Yogen mansai chakujitsu ni :Steadily loaded with prophecies
:旬に応じた的中を :Shun ni ōjita tekichū o :Hitting the mark according to the right time
:示す尊き理のふしん :Shimesu tōtoki ri no fushin :Is the precious construction of principle that is shown
:惨たり道の沿革史 :San tari michi no enkaku-shi :The tragic history of the path
:苦難が実る黎明期 :Kunan ga minoru reimei-ki :Is the dawn when hardship bears fruit
:ひながた踏んだほんぶしん :Hinagata funda hon-bushin :The true construction that has followed the divine model
:死灰で死滅の世直しに :Shikai de shimetsu no yonaoshi ni :For the world-renewal from dead ashes
:既成の殻を打ち破る :Kisei no kara o uchiyaburu :Breaking the shell of the established order
:神おもわくの正解教 :Kami omowaku no seikai-kyō :Is the correct teaching of God's will
:道人没我でひのきしん :Michi-bito botsuga de hinokishin :The followers of the path, in selflessness, perform daily service
:神の世ゆえに神一条 :Kami no yo yue ni Kami ichijō :Because it is the world of God, it is God in a single line
:意義にめざめた正人間 :Igi ni mezameta sei-ningen :The true human being awakened to the meaning
:熱誠貫く神の使者 :Nessei tsuranuku Kami no shisha :Is a messenger of God who carries through with sincerity
:天理の大道打ち出して :Tenri no daidō uchidashite :Putting forth the great path of Heavenly Principle
:正当教理で世に先駆 :Seitō kyōri de yo ni senku :Pioneering the world with orthodox doctrine
:世にも珍し助けなす :Yo ni mo mezurashi tasuke nasu :Performing salvation, which is rare in the world
:神宿望の到達期 :Kami shukubō no tōtatsu-ki :Is the period of arrival of God's long-cherished desire
:理想実現初代には :Risō jitsugen shodai ni wa :In the first generation of the realization of the ideal
:神代初めの基盤なる :Kami-yo hajime no kiban naru :Is the foundation of the beginning of the age of the gods
:みろくぼさつの完全教 :Miroku Bosatsu no kanzen-kyō :The perfect teaching of Miroku Bosatsu (Maitreya Bodhisattva)
:元のふしんのみろくの世 :Moto no fushin no Miroku no yo :Is the world of Miroku of the original construction
:つとめの目当は甘露台 :Tsutome no medo wa Kanrodai :The aim of the service is the Kanrodai
:南無全世界済渡する :Namu zensekai saido suru :Adoration, saving the entire world
:不滅教えの発光体 :Fumetsu oshie no hakkō-tai :The luminous body of the immortal teaching
:神名代の元親本尊 :Kami myōdai no jiba-honzon :Is the original parent, the object of worship, the representative of God
:一れつ助けの元の親 :Ichiretsu tasuke no moto no oya :The original parent of the salvation of all
:全人類の真の親里 :Zen-jinrui no shin no sato :The true parental home of all humanity

revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Tenkei Mikyōsho]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:qq]] {{moved to|Tenkei Mikyōsho}}

{{moved from|Tenkei Okyōsho}} In September 1965, Ōnishi Tama composed '''''Tenkei Mikyōsho''''' ([[q:ja:大西玉#天啓御教書|天啓御教書]], "Book of Divine Revelations"), a 100-line poem explaining the core doctrines of the Honbushin religion. The poem is published in ''Uchū Hontairon'' (宇宙本体論, "Origin of the Universe"), a 1994 book that gives an overview of Honbushin beliefs. The "Overview" (総序) section, which is the book's first section, was written by Ōnishi Tama in June 1961; the third section of the book (すくい綱) was written by her in July 1964.<ref>Miroku みろく [Ōnishi Tama 大西玉] (1994-04-26). ''Uchū Hontairon'' 宇宙本体論. Plus One プラスワン出版社. ISBN 4-938753-90-1.</ref>
==Original text== (南無甘露台)
*物極不滅は神完全 ::陰陽自存の大精神 :宇宙の極は心のみ ::神独創の世の起源 :継続体系とり進む ::陰陽電気の力業
*真の自由は現実に ::根元自在の二神のみ :神はすべての因なりて ::われらの住居は結果境 :神人それぞれ本質は ::能動受動の電気にて :常にわれらは依存した ::力と力の対心形
*秩序は完全組織なリ ::万象すべては神の意志 :進化の歴史の指すところ ::神に目的ある証拠 :神の目的神中心 ::真の宗教羅針盤 :完全和合の西世界 ::神の理想の反射鏡
*人間理性の真意義は ::神の理想の理解なり :善悪是非の判別も ::神目的が正基準 :人生意義はここにあり ::建設努力が人の義務
*神こそわれらの真の父母 ::進化過程は根元に :われら育てる親心 ::示せる神の完全愛 :万差のわれら境遇は ::霊魂不減の証左なり
*心は霊の活動態 ::生とは新の旅にして :各自に応じた続き道 ::生活体の死の崩壊 :神訓育の中休み ::次生に備えた衣裳替え :すべては借物自体は無 ::刹那連続反応態
*運命宿命神の意図 ::知らでも目的コース行く :生死浮沈もことごとく ::各自を仕込む仕組みにて :神目的の部品なり ::神おもわくの個性づくり :人力無なり死が正体 ::心だけなる神の守護
*神の世界は理の支配 ::環境いっさい天の声 :目的物の全人間 ::互いに鏡で映り合う :自己が行為はみな還る ::善悪因果の訓育法 :神の摂理は完全綱 ::水も漏らさぬ理の裁き
*神は完全終始無し ::神の性格天理なり :天理に基づく理の指針 ::神の手段は神の価値 :全哲証拠神の型 ::いかなるものも破壊不可 :現象界に終始して ::神本質を知らざるの :枝の教えは道すがら ::根を知るまでの段階期
*開闢以来の天啓道 ::世界最後の元の声 :天祖の教えは全哲理 ::神目的の証拠道 :すべてに神の型示す ::予言満載着実に :旬に応じた的中を ::示す尊き理のふしん
*惨たり道の沿革史 ::苦難が実る黎明期 :ひながた踏んだほんぶしん ::死灰で死滅の世直しに :既成の殻を打ち破る ::神おもわくの正解教
*道人没我でひのきしん ::神の世ゆえに神一条 :意義にめざめた正人間 ::熱誠貫く神の使者 :天理の大道打ち出して ::正当教理で世に先駆 :世にも珍し助けなす ::神宿望の到達期
*理想実現初代には ::神代初めの基盤なる :みろくぼさつの完全教 ::元のふしんのみろくの世 :つとめの目当は甘露台 ::南無全世界済渡する
*不滅教えの発光体 ::神名代の元親本尊 :一れつ助けの元の親 ::全人類の真の親里
==Intelinear English translation== (Google Gemini 2.5 Pro translation; please check for errors and improvements)
;天啓御教書 :''Tenkei Mikyōsho'' :"The Revelatory Divine Teachings"
:物極不滅は神完全 :Butsu kyoku fu-metsu wa Kami kanzen :That which reaches the ultimate and does not perish is God's perfection
:陰陽自存の大精神 :In'yō jizon no dai-seishin :The great spirit of the self-existing yin and yang
:宇宙の極は心のみ :Uchū no kyoku wa kokoro nomi :The ultimate of the universe is only the mind/heart
:神独創の世の起源 :Kami dokusō no yo no kigen :The origin of the world is God's sole creation
:継続体系とり進む :Keizoku taikei tori susumu :Proceeding by means of a continuous system
:陰陽電気の力業 :In'yō denki no chikarawaza :The mighty work of the electricity of yin and yang
:真の自由は現実に :Shin no jiyū wa genjitsu ni :True freedom, in reality,
:根元自在の二神のみ :Kongen jizai no ni-shin nomi :Belongs only to the two gods of the origin, who are completely free
:神はすべての因なりて :Kami wa subete no in narite :God is the cause of all, and
:われらの住居は結果境 :Warera no suma-i wa kekka-kyō :Our dwelling is the realm of effect
:神人それぞれ本質は :Kami-hito sorezore honshitsu wa :The essence of God and humans, respectively, is
:能動受動の電気にて :Nōdō judō no denki nite :The electricity of activeness and passiveness
:常にわれらは依存した :Tsune ni warera wa izon shita :We have always been dependent
:力と力の対心形 :Chikara to chikara no tai-shin-kei :On the opposing forms of power and power
:秩序は完全組織なリ :Chitsujo wa kanzen soshiki nari :Order is a perfect system
:万象すべては神の意志 :Banshō subete wa Kami no ishi :All phenomena are the will of God
:進化の歴史の指すところ :Shinka no rekishi no sasu tokoro :What the history of evolution points to
:神に目的ある証拠 :Kami ni mokuteki aru shōko :Is proof that God has a purpose
:神の目的神中心 :Kami no mokuteki Kami chūshin :God's purpose is God-centered
:真の宗教羅針盤 :Shin no shūkyō rashinban :The compass of true religion
:完全和合の西世界 :Kanzen wagō no nishi-sekai :The Western world of perfect harmony
:神の理想の反射鏡 :Kami no risō no hanshakyō :Is the reflecting mirror of God's ideal
:人間理性の真意義は :Ningen risei no shin'igi wa :The true meaning of human reason
:神の理想の理解なり :Kami no risō no rikai nari :Is the understanding of God's ideal
:善悪是非の判別も :Zen'aku zehi no hanbetsu mo :The discernment of good and evil, right and wrong,
:神目的が正基準 :Kami-mokuteki ga sei-kijun :Has God's purpose as its correct standard
:人生意義はここにあり :Jinsei igi wa koko ni ari :The meaning of life is here
:建設努力が人の義務 :Kensetsu doryoku ga hito no gimu :The effort of construction is the duty of man
:神こそわれらの真の父母 :Kami koso warera no shin no fubo :God is our true parent

{{moved from|Tenkei Okyōsho}} In September 1965, Ōnishi Tama composed '''''Tenkei Mikyōsho''''' ([[q:ja:大西玉#天啓御教書|天啓御教書]], "Book of Divine Revelations"), a 100-line poem explaining the core doctrines of the Honbushin religion. The poem is published in ''Uchū Hontairon'' (宇宙本体論, "Origin of the Universe"), a 1994 book that gives an overview of Honbushin beliefs. The "Overview" (総序) section, which is the book's first section, was written by Ōnishi Tama in June 1961; the third section of the book (すくい綱) was written by her in July 1964.<ref>Miroku みろく [Ōnishi Tama 大西玉] (1994-04-26). ''Uchū Hontairon'' 宇宙本体論. Plus One プラスワン出版社. ISBN 4-938753-90-1.</ref>
==Original text== (南無甘露台)
*物極不滅は神完全 ::陰陽自存の大精神 :宇宙の極は心のみ ::神独創の世の起源 :継続体系とり進む ::陰陽電気の力業
*真の自由は現実に ::根元自在の二神のみ :神はすべての因なりて ::われらの住居は結果境 :神人それぞれ本質は ::能動受動の電気にて :常にわれらは依存した ::力と力の対心形
*秩序は完全組織なリ ::万象すべては神の意志 :進化の歴史の指すところ ::神に目的ある証拠 :神の目的神中心 ::真の宗教羅針盤 :完全和合の西世界 ::神の理想の反射鏡
*人間理性の真意義は ::神の理想の理解なり :善悪是非の判別も ::神目的が正基準 :人生意義はここにあり ::建設努力が人の義務
*神こそわれらの真の父母 ::進化過程は根元に :われら育てる親心 ::示せる神の完全愛 :万差のわれら境遇は ::霊魂不減の証左なり
*心は霊の活動態 ::生とは新の旅にして :各自に応じた続き道 ::生活体の死の崩壊 :神訓育の中休み ::次生に備えた衣裳替え :すべては借物自体は無 ::刹那連続反応態
*運命宿命神の意図 ::知らでも目的コース行く :生死浮沈もことごとく ::各自を仕込む仕組みにて :神目的の部品なり ::神おもわくの個性づくり :人力無なり死が正体 ::心だけなる神の守護
*神の世界は理の支配 ::環境いっさい天の声 :目的物の全人間 ::互いに鏡で映り合う :自己が行為はみな還る ::善悪因果の訓育法 :神の摂理は完全綱 ::水も漏らさぬ理の裁き
*神は完全終始無し ::神の性格天理なり :天理に基づく理の指針 ::神の手段は神の価値 :全哲証拠神の型 ::いかなるものも破壊不可 :現象界に終始して ::神本質を知らざるの :枝の教えは道すがら ::根を知るまでの段階期
*開闢以来の天啓道 ::世界最後の元の声 :天祖の教えは全哲理 ::神目的の証拠道 :すべてに神の型示す ::予言満載着実に :旬に応じた的中を ::示す尊き理のふしん
*惨たり道の沿革史 ::苦難が実る黎明期 :ひながた踏んだほんぶしん ::死灰で死滅の世直しに :既成の殻を打ち破る ::神おもわくの正解教
*道人没我でひのきしん ::神の世ゆえに神一条 :意義にめざめた正人間 ::熱誠貫く神の使者 :天理の大道打ち出して ::正当教理で世に先駆 :世にも珍し助けなす ::神宿望の到達期
*理想実現初代には ::神代初めの基盤なる :みろくぼさつの完全教 ::元のふしんのみろくの世 :つとめの目当は甘露台 ::南無全世界済渡する
*不滅教えの発光体 ::神名代の元親本尊 :一れつ助けの元の親 ::全人類の真の親里
==Intelinear English translation== (Google Gemini 2.5 Pro translation; please check for errors and improvements)
;天啓御教書 :''Tenkei Mikyōsho'' :"The Revelatory Divine Teachings"
:物極不滅は神完全 :Butsu kyoku fu-metsu wa Kami kanzen :That which reaches the ultimate and does not perish is God's perfection
:陰陽自存の大精神 :In'yō jizon no dai-seishin :The great spirit of the self-existing yin and yang
:宇宙の極は心のみ :Uchū no kyoku wa kokoro nomi :The ultimate of the universe is only the mind/heart
:神独創の世の起源 :Kami dokusō no yo no kigen :The origin of the world is God's sole creation
:継続体系とり進む :Keizoku taikei tori susumu :Proceeding by means of a continuous system
:陰陽電気の力業 :In'yō denki no chikarawaza :The mighty work of the electricity of yin and yang
:真の自由は現実に :Shin no jiyū wa genjitsu ni :True freedom, in reality,
:根元自在の二神のみ :Kongen jizai no ni-shin nomi :Belongs only to the two gods of the origin, who are completely free
:神はすべての因なりて :Kami wa subete no in narite :God is the cause of all, and
:われらの住居は結果境 :Warera no suma-i wa kekka-kyō :Our dwelling is the realm of effect
:神人それぞれ本質は :Kami-hito sorezore honshitsu wa :The essence of God and humans, respectively, is
:能動受動の電気にて :Nōdō judō no denki nite :The electricity of activeness and passiveness
:常にわれらは依存した :Tsune ni warera wa izon shita :We have always been dependent
:力と力の対心形 :Chikara to chikara no tai-shin-kei :On the opposing forms of power and power
:秩序は完全組織なリ :Chitsujo wa kanzen soshiki nari :Order is a perfect system
:万象すべては神の意志 :Banshō subete wa Kami no ishi :All phenomena are the will of God
:進化の歴史の指すところ :Shinka no rekishi no sasu tokoro :What the history of evolution points to
:神に目的ある証拠 :Kami ni mokuteki aru shōko :Is proof that God has a purpose
:神の目的神中心 :Kami no mokuteki Kami chūshin :God's purpose is God-centered
:真の宗教羅針盤 :Shin no shūkyō rashinban :The compass of true religion
:完全和合の西世界 :Kanzen wagō no nishi-sekai :The Western world of perfect harmony
:神の理想の反射鏡 :Kami no risō no hanshakyō :Is the reflecting mirror of God's ideal
:人間理性の真意義は :Ningen risei no shin'igi wa :The true meaning of human reason
:神の理想の理解なり :Kami no risō no rikai nari :Is the understanding of God's ideal
:善悪是非の判別も :Zen'aku zehi no hanbetsu mo :The discernment of good and evil, right and wrong,
:神目的が正基準 :Kami-mokuteki ga sei-kijun :Has God's purpose as its correct standard
:人生意義はここにあり :Jinsei igi wa koko ni ari :The meaning of life is here
:建設努力が人の義務 :Kensetsu doryoku ga hito no gimu :The effort of construction is the duty of man
:神こそわれらの真の父母 :Kami koso warera no shin no fubo :God is our true parent
:進化過程は根元に :Shinka katei wa kongen ni :The process of evolution, at its root,
:われら育てる親心 :Warera sodateru oya-gokoro :Is the parental heart that nurtures us
:示せる神の完全愛 :Shimeseru Kami no kanzen-ai :The manifested perfect love of God
:万差のわれら境遇は :Bansa no warera kyōgū wa :Our myriad different circumstances
:霊魂不減の証左なり :Reikon fu-metsu no shōsa nari :Are proof of the indestructibility of the soul
:心は霊の活動態 :Kokoro wa rei no katsudō-tai :The mind is the active state of the spirit
:生とは新の旅にして :Sei to wa kokoro no tabi ni shite :Life is a new journey
:各自に応じた続き道 :Kakuji ni ōjita tsuzuki-michi :A continuous path according to each individual
:生活体の死の崩壊 :Seikatsu-tai no shi no hōkai :The collapse of the living body at death
:神訓育の中休み :Kami kun'iku no nakayasumi :Is a brief rest in God's training
:次生に備えた衣裳替え :Jisei ni sonaeta ishōgae :A change of clothes in preparation for the next life
:すべては借物自体は無 :Subete wa karimono jitai wa mu :Everything is a borrowed thing; in itself, it is nothing
:刹那連続反応態 :Setsuna renzoku hannō-tai :A continuous state of momentary reactions
:運命宿命神の意図 :Unmei shukumei Kami no ito :Fate and destiny are God's intention
:知らでも目的コース行く :Shirade mo mokuteki kōsu yuku :Even without knowing it, we follow the course of purpose
:生死浮沈もことごとく :Seishi fuchin mo kotogotoku :Life and death, ups and downs, all of it
:各自を仕込む仕組みにて :Kakuji o shikomu shikumi nite :Is a mechanism for training each individual
:神目的の部品なり :Kami-mokuteki no buhin nari :We are parts of God's purpose
:神おもわくの個性づくり :Kami omowaku no saga-zukuri :The creation of individuality according to God's will
:人力無なり死が正体 :Jinryoku mu nari shi ga shōtai :Human power is nothing; death is its true nature
:心だけなる神の守護 :Kokoro dake naru Kami no shugo :Only the mind/heart is God's protection
:神の世界は理の支配 :Kami no sekai wa ri no shihai :The world of God is the dominion of reason/principle
:環境いっさい天の声 :Kankyō issai Ten no koe :The entire environment is the voice of Heaven
:目的物の全人間 :Mokuteki-butsu no zen-ningen :All human beings, the objects of the purpose
:互いに鏡で映り合う :Tagai ni kagami de utsuri-au :Reflect each other in a mirror
:自己が行為はみな還る :Ono ga kōi wa mina kaeru :One's own actions all return
:善悪因果の訓育法 :Zen'aku inga no kun'iku-hō :The training method of cause and effect of good and evil
:神の摂理は完全綱 :Kami no setsuri wa kanzen-mō :God's providence is a perfect web
:水も漏らさぬ理の裁き :Mizu mo morasanu ri no sabaki :The judgment of principle that lets no water leak
:神は完全終始無し :Kami wa kanzen shūshi nashi :God is perfect, without beginning or end
:神の性格天理なり :Kami no seikaku Tenri nari :The nature of God is Heavenly Principle
:天理に基づく理の指針 :Tenri ni motozuku ri no shishin :The guidance of principle based on Heavenly Principle
:神の手段は神の価値 :Kami no tedate wa Kami no kachi :God's means are God's values
:全哲証拠神の型 :Zen-tetsu shōko Kami no kata :The proof of all philosophy is the model of God
:いかなるものも破壊不可 :Ikanaru mono mo hakai fuka :Which cannot be destroyed by anything
:現象界に終始して :Genshō-kai ni shūshi shite :To be engrossed in the phenomenal world
:神本質を知らざるの :Kami-honshitsu o shirazaru no :And not know the essence of God
:枝の教えは道すがら :Eda no oshie wa michisugara :The teachings of the branches are on the way
:根を知るまでの段階期 :Ne o shiru made no dankai-ki :A stage until one knows the root
:開闢以来の天啓道 :Kaibyaku irai no tenkei-dō :The way of revelation since the beginning of the world
:世界最後の元の声 :Sekai saigo no moto no koe :Is the final, original voice of the world
:天祖の教えは全哲理 :Tenso no oshie wa zen-tetsuri :The teaching of the Heavenly Ancestor is the entire philosophy
:神目的の証拠道 :Kami-mokuteki no shōko-michi :The way of proof of God's purpose
:すべてに神の型示す :Subete ni Kami no kata shimesu :In all things, the model of God is shown
:予言満載着実に :Yogen mansai chakujitsu ni :Steadily loaded with prophecies
:旬に応じた的中を :Shun ni ōjita tekichū o :Hitting the mark according to the right time
:示す尊き理のふしん :Shimesu tōtoki ri no fushin :Is the precious construction of principle that is shown
:惨たり道の沿革史 :San tari michi no enkaku-shi :The tragic history of the path
:苦難が実る黎明期 :Kunan ga minoru reimei-ki :Is the dawn when hardship bears fruit
:ひながた踏んだほんぶしん :Hinagata funda hon-bushin :The true construction that has followed the divine model
:死灰で死滅の世直しに :Shikai de shimetsu no yonaoshi ni :For the world-renewal from dead ashes
:既成の殻を打ち破る :Kisei no kara o uchiyaburu :Breaking the shell of the established order
:神おもわくの正解教 :Kami omowaku no seikai-kyō :Is the correct teaching of God's will
:道人没我でひのきしん :Michi-bito botsuga de hinokishin :The followers of the path, in selflessness, perform daily service
:神の世ゆえに神一条 :Kami no yo yue ni Kami ichijō :Because it is the world of God, it is God in a single line
:意義にめざめた正人間 :Igi ni mezameta sei-ningen :The true human being awakened to the meaning
:熱誠貫く神の使者 :Nessei tsuranuku Kami no shisha :Is a messenger of God who carries through with sincerity
:天理の大道打ち出して :Tenri no daidō uchidashite :Putting forth the great path of Heavenly Principle
:正当教理で世に先駆 :Seitō kyōri de yo ni senku :Pioneering the world with orthodox doctrine
:世にも珍し助けなす :Yo ni mo mezurashi tasuke nasu :Performing salvation, which is rare in the world
:神宿望の到達期 :Kami shukubō no tōtatsu-ki :Is the period of arrival of God's long-cherished desire
:理想実現初代には :Risō jitsugen shodai ni wa :In the first generation of the realization of the ideal
:神代初めの基盤なる :Kami-yo hajime no kiban naru :Is the foundation of the beginning of the age of the gods
:みろくぼさつの完全教 :Miroku Bosatsu no kanzen-kyō :The perfect teaching of Miroku Bosatsu (Maitreya Bodhisattva)
:元のふしんのみろくの世 :Moto no fushin no Miroku no yo :Is the world of Miroku of the original construction
:つとめの目当は甘露台 :Tsutome no medo wa Kanrodai :The aim of the service is the Kanrodai
:南無全世界済渡する :Namu zensekai saido suru :Adoration, saving the entire world
:不滅教えの発光体 :Fumetsu oshie no hakkō-tai :The luminous body of the immortal teaching
:神名代の元親本尊 :Kami myōdai no jiba-honzon :Is the original parent, the object of worship, the representative of God
:一れつ助けの元の親 :Ichiretsu tasuke no moto no oya :The original parent of the salvation of all
:全人類の真の親里 :Zen-jinrui no shin no sato :The true parental home of all humanity

The poem is published in ''Uchū Hontairon'' (宇宙本体論, "Origin of the Universe"), a 1994 book that gives an overview of Honbushin beliefs. The "Overview" (総序) section, which is the book's first section, was written by Ōnishi Tama in June 1961; the third section of the book (すくい綱) was written by her in July 1964.<ref>Miroku みろく [Ōnishi Tama 大西玉] (1994-04-26). :われら育てる親心 :Warera sodateru oya-gokoro :Is the parental heart that nurtures us
:示せる神の完全愛 :Shimeseru Kami no kanzen-ai :The manifested perfect love of God
:万差のわれら境遇は :Bansa no warera kyōgū wa :Our myriad different circumstances
:霊魂不減の証左なり :Reikon fu-metsu no shōsa nari :Are proof of the indestructibility of the soul
:心は霊の活動態 :Kokoro wa rei no katsudō-tai :The mind is the active state of the spirit
:生とは新の旅にして :Sei to wa kokoro no tabi ni shite :Life is a new journey
:各自に応じた続き道 :Kakuji ni ōjita tsuzuki-michi :A continuous path according to each individual
:生活体の死の崩壊 :Seikatsu-tai no shi no hōkai :The collapse of the living body at death
:神訓育の中休み :Kami kun'iku no nakayasumi :Is a brief rest in God's training
:次生に備えた衣裳替え :Jisei ni sonaeta ishōgae :A change of clothes in preparation for the next life
:すべては借物自体は無 :Subete wa karimono jitai wa mu :Everything is a borrowed thing; in itself, it is nothing
:刹那連続反応態 :Setsuna renzoku hannō-tai :A continuous state of momentary reactions
:運命宿命神の意図 :Unmei shukumei Kami no ito :Fate and destiny are God's intention
:知らでも目的コース行く :Shirade mo mokuteki kōsu yuku :Even without knowing it, we follow the course of purpose
:生死浮沈もことごとく :Seishi fuchin mo kotogotoku :Life and death, ups and downs, all of it
:各自を仕込む仕組みにて :Kakuji o shikomu shikumi nite :Is a mechanism for training each individual
:神目的の部品なり :Kami-mokuteki no buhin nari :We are parts of God's purpose
:神おもわくの個性づくり :Kami omowaku no saga-zukuri :The creation of individuality according to God's will
:人力無なり死が正体 :Jinryoku mu nari shi ga shōtai :Human power is nothing; death is its true nature
:心だけなる神の守護 :Kokoro dake naru Kami no shugo :Only the mind/heart is God's protection
:神の世界は理の支配 :Kami no sekai wa ri no shihai :The world of God is the dominion of reason/principle
:環境いっさい天の声 :Kankyō issai Ten no koe :The entire environment is the voice of Heaven
:目的物の全人間 :Mokuteki-butsu no zen-ningen :All human beings, the objects of the purpose
:互いに鏡で映り合う :Tagai ni kagami de utsuri-au :Reflect each other in a mirror
:自己が行為はみな還る :Ono ga kōi wa mina kaeru :One's own actions all return
:善悪因果の訓育法 :Zen'aku inga no kun'iku-hō :The training method of cause and effect of good and evil
:神の摂理は完全綱 :Kami no setsuri wa kanzen-mō :God's providence is a perfect web
:水も漏らさぬ理の裁き :Mizu mo morasanu ri no sabaki :The judgment of principle that lets no water leak
:神は完全終始無し :Kami wa kanzen shūshi nashi :God is perfect, without beginning or end
:神の性格天理なり :Kami no seikaku Tenri nari :The nature of God is Heavenly Principle
:天理に基づく理の指針 :Tenri ni motozuku ri no shishin :The guidance of principle based on Heavenly Principle
:神の手段は神の価値 :Kami no tedate wa Kami no kachi :God's means are God's values
:全哲証拠神の型 :Zen-tetsu shōko Kami no kata :The proof of all philosophy is the model of God
:いかなるものも破壊不可 :Ikanaru mono mo hakai fuka :Which cannot be destroyed by anything
:現象界に終始して :Genshō-kai ni shūshi shite :To be engrossed in the phenomenal world
:神本質を知らざるの :Kami-honshitsu o shirazaru no :And not know the essence of God
:枝の教えは道すがら :Eda no oshie wa michisugara :The teachings of the branches are on the way
:根を知るまでの段階期 :Ne o shiru made no dankai-ki :A stage until one knows the root
:開闢以来の天啓道 :Kaibyaku irai no tenkei-dō :The way of revelation since the beginning of the world
:世界最後の元の声 :Sekai saigo no moto no koe :Is the final, original voice of the world
:天祖の教えは全哲理 :Tenso no oshie wa zen-tetsuri :The teaching of the Heavenly Ancestor is the entire philosophy
:神目的の証拠道 :Kami-mokuteki no shōko-michi :The way of proof of God's purpose
:すべてに神の型示す :Subete ni Kami no kata shimesu :In all things, the model of God is shown
:予言満載着実に :Yogen mansai chakujitsu ni :Steadily loaded with prophecies
:旬に応じた的中を :Shun ni ōjita tekichū o :Hitting the mark according to the right time
:示す尊き理のふしん :Shimesu tōtoki ri no fushin :Is the precious construction of principle that is shown
:惨たり道の沿革史 :San tari michi no enkaku-shi :The tragic history of the path
:苦難が実る黎明期 :Kunan ga minoru reimei-ki :Is the dawn when hardship bears fruit
:ひながた踏んだほんぶしん :Hinagata funda hon-bushin :The true construction that has followed the divine model
:死灰で死滅の世直しに :Shikai de shimetsu no yonaoshi ni :For the world-renewal from dead ashes
:既成の殻を打ち破る :Kisei no kara o uchiyaburu :Breaking the shell of the established order
:神おもわくの正解教 :Kami omowaku no seikai-kyō :Is the correct teaching of God's will
:道人没我でひのきしん :Michi-bito botsuga de hinokishin :The followers of the path, in selflessness, perform daily service
:神の世ゆえに神一条 :Kami no yo yue ni Kami ichijō :Because it is the world of God, it is God in a single line
:意義にめざめた正人間 :Igi ni mezameta sei-ningen :The true human being awakened to the meaning
:熱誠貫く神の使者 :Nessei tsuranuku Kami no shisha :Is a messenger of God who carries through with sincerity
:天理の大道打ち出して :Tenri no daidō uchidashite :Putting forth the great path of Heavenly Principle
:正当教理で世に先駆 :Seitō kyōri de yo ni senku :Pioneering the world with orthodox doctrine
:世にも珍し助けなす :Yo ni mo mezurashi tasuke nasu :Performing salvation, which is rare in the world
:神宿望の到達期 :Kami shukubō no tōtatsu-ki :Is the period of arrival of God's long-cherished desire
:理想実現初代には :Risō jitsugen shodai ni wa :In the first generation of the realization of the ideal
:神代初めの基盤なる :Kami-yo hajime no kiban naru :Is the foundation of the beginning of the age of the gods
:みろくぼさつの完全教 :Miroku Bosatsu no kanzen-kyō :The perfect teaching of Miroku Bosatsu (Maitreya Bodhisattva)
:元のふしんのみろくの世 :Moto no fushin no Miroku no yo :Is the world of Miroku of the original construction
:つとめの目当は甘露台 :Tsutome no medo wa Kanrodai :The aim of the service is the Kanrodai
:南無全世界済渡する :Namu zensekai saido suru :Adoration, saving the entire world
:不滅教えの発光体 :Fumetsu oshie no hakkō-tai :The luminous body of the immortal teaching
:神名代の元親本尊 :Kami myōdai no jiba-honzon :Is the original parent, the object of worship, the representative of God
:一れつ助けの元の親 :Ichiretsu tasuke no moto no oya :The original parent of the salvation of all
:全人類の真の親里 :Zen-jinrui no shin no sato :The true parental home of all humanity

{{moved from|Tenkei Okyōsho}} In September 1965, Ōnishi Tama composed '''''Tenkei Mikyōsho''''' ([[q:ja:大西玉#天啓御教書|天啓御教書]], "Book of Divine Revelations"), a 100-line poem explaining the core doctrines of the Honbushin religion. The poem is published in ''Uchū Hontairon'' (宇宙本体論, "Origin of the Universe"), a 1994 book that gives an overview of Honbushin beliefs. The "Overview" (総序) section, which is the book's first section, was written by Ōnishi Tama in June 1961; the third section of the book (すくい綱) was written by her in July 1964.<ref>Miroku みろく [Ōnishi Tama 大西玉] (1994-04-26). ''Uchū Hontairon'' 宇宙本体論. Plus One プラスワン出版社. ISBN 4-938753-90-1.</ref>
==Original text== (南無甘露台)
*物極不滅は神完全 ::陰陽自存の大精神 :宇宙の極は心のみ ::神独創の世の起源 :継続体系とり進む ::陰陽電気の力業
*真の自由は現実に ::根元自在の二神のみ :神はすべての因なりて ::われらの住居は結果境 :神人それぞれ本質は ::能動受動の電気にて :常にわれらは依存した ::力と力の対心形
*秩序は完全組織なリ ::万象すべては神の意志 :進化の歴史の指すところ ::神に目的ある証拠 :神の目的神中心 ::真の宗教羅針盤 :完全和合の西世界 ::神の理想の反射鏡
*人間理性の真意義は ::神の理想の理解なり :善悪是非の判別も ::神目的が正基準 :人生意義はここにあり ::建設努力が人の義務
*神こそわれらの真の父母 ::進化過程は根元に :われら育てる親心 ::示せる神の完全愛 :万差のわれら境遇は ::霊魂不減の証左なり
*心は霊の活動態 ::生とは新の旅にして :各自に応じた続き道 ::生活体の死の崩壊 :神訓育の中休み ::次生に備えた衣裳替え :すべては借物自体は無 ::刹那連続反応態
*運命宿命神の意図 ::知らでも目的コース行く :生死浮沈もことごとく ::各自を仕込む仕組みにて :神目的の部品なり ::神おもわくの個性づくり :人力無なり死が正体 ::心だけなる神の守護
*神の世界は理の支配 ::環境いっさい天の声 :目的物の全人間 ::互いに鏡で映り合う :自己が行為はみな還る ::善悪因果の訓育法 :神の摂理は完全綱 ::水も漏らさぬ理の裁き
*神は完全終始無し ::神の性格天理なり :天理に基づく理の指針 ::神の手段は神の価値 :全哲証拠神の型 ::いかなるものも破壊不可 :現象界に終始して ::神本質を知らざるの :枝の教えは道すがら ::根を知るまでの段階期
*開闢以来の天啓道 ::世界最後の元の声 :天祖の教えは全哲理 ::神目的の証拠道 :すべてに神の型示す ::予言満載着実に :旬に応じた的中を ::示す尊き理のふしん
*惨たり道の沿革史 ::苦難が実る黎明期 :ひながた踏んだほんぶしん ::死灰で死滅の世直しに :既成の殻を打ち破る ::神おもわくの正解教
*道人没我でひのきしん ::神の世ゆえに神一条 :意義にめざめた正人間 ::熱誠貫く神の使者 :天理の大道打ち出して ::正当教理で世に先駆 :世にも珍し助けなす ::神宿望の到達期
*理想実現初代には ::神代初めの基盤なる :みろくぼさつの完全教 ::元のふしんのみろくの世 :つとめの目当は甘露台 ::南無全世界済渡する
*不滅教えの発光体 ::神名代の元親本尊 :一れつ助けの元の親 ::全人類の真の親里

;天啓御教書 :''Tenkei Mikyōsho'' :"The Revelatory Divine Teachings"
:物極不滅は神完全 :Butsu kyoku fu-metsu wa Kami kanzen :That which reaches the ultimate and does not perish is God's perfection
:陰陽自存の大精神 :In'yō jizon no dai-seishin :The great spirit of the self-existing yin and yang
:宇宙の極は心のみ :Uchū no kyoku wa kokoro nomi :The ultimate of the universe is only the mind/heart
:神独創の世の起源 :Kami dokusō no yo no kigen :The origin of the world is God's sole creation
:継続体系とり進む :Keizoku taikei tori susumu :Proceeding by means of a continuous system
:陰陽電気の力業 :In'yō denki no chikarawaza :The mighty work of the electricity of yin and yang
:真の自由は現実に :Shin no jiyū wa genjitsu ni :True freedom, in reality,
:根元自在の二神のみ :Kongen jizai no ni-shin nomi :Belongs only to the two gods of the origin, who are completely free
:神はすべての因なりて :Kami wa subete no in narite :God is the cause of all, and
:われらの住居は結果境 :Warera no suma-i wa kekka-kyō :Our dwelling is the realm of effect
:神人それぞれ本質は :Kami-hito sorezore honshitsu wa :The essence of God and humans, respectively, is
:能動受動の電気にて :Nōdō judō no denki nite :The electricity of activeness and passiveness
:常にわれらは依存した :Tsune ni warera wa izon shita :We have always been dependent
:力と力の対心形 :Chikara to chikara no tai-shin-kei :On the opposing forms of power and power
:秩序は完全組織なリ :Chitsujo wa kanzen soshiki nari :Order is a perfect system

#REDIRECT [[Tenkei Mikyōsho]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:qq]] {{moved to|Tenkei Mikyōsho}}[[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

{{moved from|Tenkei Okyōsho}} In September 1965, Ōnishi Tama composed '''''Tenkei Mikyōsho''''' ([[q:ja:大西玉#天啓御教書|天啓御教書]], "Book of Divine Revelations"), a 100-line poem explaining the core doctrines of the Honbushin religion. The poem is published in ''Uchū Hontairon'' (宇宙本体論, "Origin of the Universe"), a 1994 book that gives an overview of Honbushin beliefs. The "Overview" (総序) section, which is the book's first section, was written by Ōnishi Tama in June 1961; the third section of the book (すくい綱) was written by her in July 1964.<ref>Miroku みろく [Ōnishi Tama 大西玉] (1994-04-26). ''Uchū Hontairon'' 宇宙本体論. Plus One プラスワン出版社. ISBN 4-938753-90-1.</ref>
==Original text== (南無甘露台)
*物極不滅は神完全 ::陰陽自存の大精神 :宇宙の極は心のみ ::神独創の世の起源 :継続体系とり進む ::陰陽電気の力業
*真の自由は現実に ::根元自在の二神のみ :神はすべての因なりて ::われらの住居は結果境 :神人それぞれ本質は ::能動受動の電気にて :常にわれらは依存した ::力と力の対心形
*秩序は完全組織なリ ::万象すべては神の意志 :進化の歴史の指すところ ::神に目的ある証拠 :神の目的神中心 ::真の宗教羅針盤 :完全和合の西世界 ::神の理想の反射鏡
*人間理性の真意義は ::神の理想の理解なり :善悪是非の判別も ::神目的が正基準 :人生意義はここにあり ::建設努力が人の義務
*神こそわれらの真の父母 ::進化過程は根元に :われら育てる親心 ::示せる神の完全愛 :万差のわれら境遇は ::霊魂不減の証左なり
*心は霊の活動態 ::生とは新の旅にして :各自に応じた続き道 ::生活体の死の崩壊 :神訓育の中休み ::次生に備えた衣裳替え :すべては借物自体は無 ::刹那連続反応態
*運命宿命神の意図 ::知らでも目的コース行く :生死浮沈もことごとく ::各自を仕込む仕組みにて :神目的の部品なり ::神おもわくの個性づくり :人力無なり死が正体 ::心だけなる神の守護
*神の世界は理の支配 ::環境いっさい天の声 :目的物の全人間 ::互いに鏡で映り合う :自己が行為はみな還る ::善悪因果の訓育法 :神の摂理は完全綱 ::水も漏らさぬ理の裁き
*神は完全終始無し ::神の性格天理なり :天理に基づく理の指針 ::神の手段は神の価値 :全哲証拠神の型 ::いかなるものも破壊不可 :現象界に終始して ::神本質を知らざるの :枝の教えは道すがら ::根を知るまでの段階期
*開闢以来の天啓道 ::世界最後の元の声 :天祖の教えは全哲理 ::神目的の証拠道 :すべてに神の型示す ::予言満載着実に :旬に応じた的中を ::示す尊き理のふしん
*惨たり道の沿革史 ::苦難が実る黎明期 :ひながた踏んだほんぶしん ::死灰で死滅の世直しに :既成の殻を打ち破る ::神おもわくの正解教
*道人没我でひのきしん ::神の世ゆえに神一条 :意義にめざめた正人間 ::熱誠貫く神の使者 :天理の大道打ち出して ::正当教理で世に先駆 :世にも珍し助けなす ::神宿望の到達期
*理想実現初代には ::神代初めの基盤なる :みろくぼさつの完全教 ::元のふしんのみろくの世 :つとめの目当は甘露台 ::南無全世界済渡する
*不滅教えの発光体 ::神名代の元親本尊 :一れつ助けの元の親 ::全人類の真の親里
==Intelinear English translation== (Google Gemini 2.5 Pro translation; please check for errors and improvements)
;天啓御教書 :''Tenkei Mikyōsho'' :"The Revelatory Divine Teachings"
:物極不滅は神完全 :Butsu kyoku fu-metsu wa Kami kanzen :That which reaches the ultimate and does not perish is God's perfection
:陰陽自存の大精神 :In'yō jizon no dai-seishin :The great spirit of the self-existing yin and yang
:宇宙の極は心のみ :Uchū no kyoku wa kokoro nomi :The ultimate of the universe is only the mind/heart
:神独創の世の起源 :Kami dokusō no yo no kigen :The origin of the world is God's sole creation
:継続体系とり進む :Keizoku taikei tori susumu :Proceeding by means of a continuous system
:陰陽電気の力業 :In'yō denki no chikarawaza :The mighty work of the electricity of yin and yang
:真の自由は現実に :Shin no jiyū wa genjitsu ni :True freedom, in reality,
:根元自在の二神のみ :Kongen jizai no ni-shin nomi :Belongs only to the two gods of the origin, who are completely free
:神はすべての因なりて :Kami wa subete no in narite :God is the cause of all, and
:われらの住居は結果境 :Warera no suma-i wa kekka-kyō :Our dwelling is the realm of effect
:神人それぞれ本質は :Kami-hito sorezore honshitsu wa :The essence of God and humans, respectively, is
:能動受動の電気にて :Nōdō judō no denki nite :The electricity of activeness and passiveness
:常にわれらは依存した :Tsune ni warera wa izon shita :We have always been dependent
:力と力の対心形 :Chikara to chikara no tai-shin-kei :On the opposing forms of power and power
:秩序は完全組織なリ :Chitsujo wa kanzen soshiki nari :Order is a perfect system
:万象すべては神の意志 :Banshō subete wa Kami no ishi :All phenomena are the will of God
:進化の歴史の指すところ :Shinka no rekishi no sasu tokoro :What the history of evolution points to
:神に目的ある証拠 :Kami ni mokuteki aru shōko :Is proof that God has a purpose
:神の目的神中心 :Kami no mokuteki Kami chūshin :God's purpose is God-centered
:真の宗教羅針盤 :Shin no shūkyō rashinban :The compass of true religion
:完全和合の西世界 :Kanzen wagō no nishi-sekai :The Western world of perfect harmony
:神の理想の反射鏡 :Kami no risō no hanshakyō :Is the reflecting mirror of God's ideal
:人間理性の真意義は :Ningen risei no shin'igi wa :The true meaning of human reason
:神の理想の理解なり :Kami no risō no rikai nari :Is the understanding of God's ideal
:善悪是非の判別も :Zen'aku zehi no hanbetsu mo :The discernment of good and evil, right and wrong,
:神目的が正基準 :Kami-mokuteki ga sei-kijun :Has God's purpose as its correct standard
:人生意義はここにあり :Jinsei igi wa koko ni ari :The meaning of life is here
:建設努力が人の義務 :Kensetsu doryoku ga hito no gimu :The effort of construction is the duty of man
:神こそわれらの真の父母 :Kami koso warera no shin no fubo :God is our true parent
:進化過程は根元に :Shinka katei wa kongen ni :The process of evolution, at its root,
:われら育てる親心 :Warera sodateru oya-gokoro :Is the parental heart that nurtures us
:示せる神の完全愛 :Shimeseru Kami no kanzen-ai :The manifested perfect love of God
:万差のわれら境遇は :Bansa no warera kyōgū wa :Our myriad different circumstances
:霊魂不減の証左なり :Reikon fu-metsu no shōsa nari :Are proof of the indestructibility of the soul
:心は霊の活動態 :Kokoro wa rei no katsudō-tai :The mind is the active state of the spirit
:生とは新の旅にして :Sei to wa kokoro no tabi ni shite :Life is a new journey
:各自に応じた続き道 :Kakuji ni ōjita tsuzuki-michi :A continuous path according to each individual
:生活体の死の崩壊 :Seikatsu-tai no shi no hōkai :The collapse of the living body at death
:神訓育の中休み :Kami kun'iku no nakayasumi :Is a brief rest in God's training
:次生に備えた衣裳替え :Jisei ni sonaeta ishōgae :A change of clothes in preparation for the next life
:すべては借物自体は無 :Subete wa karimono jitai wa mu :Everything is a borrowed thing; in itself, it is nothing
:刹那連続反応態 :Setsuna renzoku hannō-tai :A continuous state of momentary reactions
:運命宿命神の意図 :Unmei shukumei Kami no ito :Fate and destiny are God's intention
:知らでも目的コース行く :Shirade mo mokuteki kōsu yuku :Even without knowing it, we follow the course of purpose
:生死浮沈もことごとく :Seishi fuchin mo kotogotoku :Life and death, ups and downs, all of it
:各自を仕込む仕組みにて :Kakuji o shikomu shikumi nite :Is a mechanism for training each individual
:神目的の部品なり :Kami-mokuteki no buhin nari :We are parts of God's purpose
:神おもわくの個性づくり :Kami omowaku no saga-zukuri :The creation of individuality according to God's will
:人力無なり死が正体 :Jinryoku mu nari shi ga shōtai :Human power is nothing; death is its true nature
:心だけなる神の守護 :Kokoro dake naru Kami no shugo :Only the mind/heart is God's protection
:神の世界は理の支配 :Kami no sekai wa ri no shihai :The world of God is the dominion of reason/principle
:環境いっさい天の声 :Kankyō issai Ten no koe :The entire environment is the voice of Heaven
:目的物の全人間 :Mokuteki-butsu no zen-ningen :All human beings, the objects of the purpose
:互いに鏡で映り合う :Tagai ni kagami de utsuri-au :Reflect each other in a mirror
:自己が行為はみな還る :Ono ga kōi wa mina kaeru :One's own actions all return
:善悪因果の訓育法 :Zen'aku inga no kun'iku-hō :The training method of cause and effect of good and evil
:神の摂理は完全綱 :Kami no setsuri wa kanzen-mō :God's providence is a perfect web
:水も漏らさぬ理の裁き :Mizu mo morasanu ri no sabaki :The judgment of principle that lets no water leak
:神は完全終始無し :Kami wa kanzen shūshi nashi :God is perfect, without beginning or end
:神の性格天理なり :Kami no seikaku Tenri nari :The nature of God is Heavenly Principle
:天理に基づく理の指針 :Tenri ni motozuku ri no shishin :The guidance of principle based on Heavenly Principle
:神の手段は神の価値 :Kami no tedate wa Kami no kachi :God's means are God's values
:全哲証拠神の型 :Zen-tetsu shōko Kami no kata :The proof of all philosophy is the model of God
:いかなるものも破壊不可 :Ikanaru mono mo hakai fuka :Which cannot be destroyed by anything
:現象界に終始して :Genshō-kai ni shūshi shite :To be engrossed in the phenomenal world
:神本質を知らざるの :Kami-honshitsu o shirazaru no :And not know the essence of God
:枝の教えは道すがら :Eda no oshie wa michisugara :The teachings of the branches are on the way
:根を知るまでの段階期 :Ne o shiru made no dankai-ki :A stage until one knows the root
:開闢以来の天啓道 :Kaibyaku irai no tenkei-dō :The way of revelation since the beginning of the world
:世界最後の元の声 :Sekai saigo no moto no koe :Is the final, original voice of the world
:天祖の教えは全哲理 :Tenso no oshie wa zen-tetsuri :The teaching of the Heavenly Ancestor is the entire philosophy
:神目的の証拠道 :Kami-mokuteki no shōko-michi :The way of proof of God's purpose
:すべてに神の型示す :Subete ni Kami no kata shimesu :In all things, the model of God is shown
:予言満載着実に :Yogen mansai chakujitsu ni :Steadily loaded with prophecies
:旬に応じた的中を :Shun ni ōjita tekichū o :Hitting the mark according to the right time
:示す尊き理のふしん :Shimesu tōtoki ri no fushin :Is the precious construction of principle that is shown
:惨たり道の沿革史 :San tari michi no enkaku-shi :The tragic history of the path
:苦難が実る黎明期 :Kunan ga minoru reimei-ki :Is the dawn when hardship bears fruit
:ひながた踏んだほんぶしん :Hinagata funda hon-bushin :The true construction that has followed the divine model
:死灰で死滅の世直しに :Shikai de shimetsu no yonaoshi ni :For the world-renewal from dead ashes
:既成の殻を打ち破る :Kisei no kara o uchiyaburu :Breaking the shell of the established order
:神おもわくの正解教 :Kami omowaku no seikai-kyō :Is the correct teaching of God's will
:道人没我でひのきしん :Michi-bito botsuga de hinokishin :The followers of the path, in selflessness, perform daily service
:神の世ゆえに神一条 :Kami no yo yue ni Kami ichijō :Because it is the world of God, it is God in a single line
:意義にめざめた正人間 :Igi ni mezameta sei-ningen :The true human being awakened to the meaning
:熱誠貫く神の使者 :Nessei tsuranuku Kami no shisha :Is a messenger of God who carries through with sincerity
:天理の大道打ち出して :Tenri no daidō uchidashite :Putting forth the great path of Heavenly Principle
:正当教理で世に先駆 :Seitō kyōri de yo ni senku :Pioneering the world with orthodox doctrine
:世にも珍し助けなす :Yo ni mo mezurashi tasuke nasu :Performing salvation, which is rare in the world
:神宿望の到達期 :Kami shukubō no tōtatsu-ki :Is the period of arrival of God's long-cherished desire
:理想実現初代には :Risō jitsugen shodai ni wa :In the first generation of the realization of the ideal
:神代初めの基盤なる :Kami-yo hajime no kiban naru :Is the foundation of the beginning of the age of the gods
:みろくぼさつの完全教 :Miroku Bosatsu no kanzen-kyō :The perfect teaching of Miroku Bosatsu (Maitreya Bodhisattva)
:元のふしんのみろくの世 :Moto no fushin no Miroku no yo :Is the world of Miroku of the original construction
:つとめの目当は甘露台 :Tsutome no medo wa Kanrodai :The aim of the service is the Kanrodai
:南無全世界済渡する :Namu zensekai saido suru :Adoration, saving the entire world
:不滅教えの発光体 :Fumetsu oshie no hakkō-tai :The luminous body of the immortal teaching
:神名代の元親本尊 :Kami myōdai no jiba-honzon :Is the original parent, the object of worship, the representative of God
:一れつ助けの元の親 :Ichiretsu tasuke no moto no oya :The original parent of the salvation of all
:全人類の真の親里 :Zen-jinrui no shin no sato :The true parental home of all humanity

The poem is published in ''Uchū Hontairon'' (宇宙本体論, "Origin of the Universe"), a 1994 book that gives an overview of Honbushin beliefs. The "Overview" (総序) section, which is the book's first section, was written by Ōnishi Tama in June 1961; the third section of the book (すくい綱) was written by her in July 1964.<ref>Miroku みろく [Ōnishi Tama 大西玉] (1994-04-26). :神目的が正基準 :Kami-mokuteki ga sei-kijun :Has God's purpose as its correct standard
:人生意義はここにあり :Jinsei igi wa koko ni ari :The meaning of life is here
:建設努力が人の義務 :Kensetsu doryoku ga hito no gimu :The effort of construction is the duty of man
:神こそわれらの真の父母 :Kami koso warera no shin no fubo :God is our true parent
:進化過程は根元に :Shinka katei wa kongen ni :The process of evolution, at its root,
:われら育てる親心 :Warera sodateru oya-gokoro :Is the parental heart that nurtures us
:示せる神の完全愛 :Shimeseru Kami no kanzen-ai :The manifested perfect love of God
:万差のわれら境遇は :Bansa no warera kyōgū wa :Our myriad different circumstances
:霊魂不減の証左なり :Reikon fu-metsu no shōsa nari :Are proof of the indestructibility of the soul
:心は霊の活動態 :Kokoro wa rei no katsudō-tai :The mind is the active state of the spirit
:生とは新の旅にして :Sei to wa kokoro no tabi ni shite :Life is a new journey
:各自に応じた続き道 :Kakuji ni ōjita tsuzuki-michi :A continuous path according to each individual
:生活体の死の崩壊 :Seikatsu-tai no shi no hōkai :The collapse of the living body at death
:神訓育の中休み :Kami kun'iku no nakayasumi :Is a brief rest in God's training
:次生に備えた衣裳替え :Jisei ni sonaeta ishōgae :A change of clothes in preparation for the next life
:すべては借物自体は無 :Subete wa karimono jitai wa mu :Everything is a borrowed thing; in itself, it is nothing
:刹那連続反応態 :Setsuna renzoku hannō-tai :A continuous state of momentary reactions
:運命宿命神の意図 :Unmei shukumei Kami no ito :Fate and destiny are God's intention
:知らでも目的コース行く :Shirade mo mokuteki kōsu yuku :Even without knowing it, we follow the course of purpose
:生死浮沈もことごとく :Seishi fuchin mo kotogotoku :Life and death, ups and downs, all of it
:各自を仕込む仕組みにて :Kakuji o shikomu shikumi nite :Is a mechanism for training each individual
:神目的の部品なり :Kami-mokuteki no buhin nari :We are parts of God's purpose
:神おもわくの個性づくり :Kami omowaku no saga-zukuri :The creation of individuality according to God's will
:人力無なり死が正体 :Jinryoku mu nari shi ga shōtai :Human power is nothing; death is its true nature
:心だけなる神の守護 :Kokoro dake naru Kami no shugo :Only the mind/heart is God's protection
:神の世界は理の支配 :Kami no sekai wa ri no shihai :The world of God is the dominion of reason/principle
:環境いっさい天の声 :Kankyō issai Ten no koe :The entire environment is the voice of Heaven
:目的物の全人間 :Mokuteki-butsu no zen-ningen :All human beings, the objects of the purpose
:互いに鏡で映り合う :Tagai ni kagami de utsuri-au :Reflect each other in a mirror
:自己が行為はみな還る :Ono ga kōi wa mina kaeru :One's own actions all return
:善悪因果の訓育法 :Zen'aku inga no kun'iku-hō :The training method of cause and effect of good and evil
:神の摂理は完全綱 :Kami no setsuri wa kanzen-mō :God's providence is a perfect web
:水も漏らさぬ理の裁き :Mizu mo morasanu ri no sabaki :The judgment of principle that lets no water leak
:神は完全終始無し :Kami wa kanzen shūshi nashi :God is perfect, without beginning or end
:神の性格天理なり :Kami no seikaku Tenri nari :The nature of God is Heavenly Principle
:天理に基づく理の指針 :Tenri ni motozuku ri no shishin :The guidance of principle based on Heavenly Principle
:神の手段は神の価値 :Kami no tedate wa Kami no kachi :God's means are God's values
:全哲証拠神の型 :Zen-tetsu shōko Kami no kata :The proof of all philosophy is the model of God
:いかなるものも破壊不可 :Ikanaru mono mo hakai fuka :Which cannot be destroyed by anything
:現象界に終始して :Genshō-kai ni shūshi shite :To be engrossed in the phenomenal world
:神本質を知らざるの :Kami-honshitsu o shirazaru no :And not know the essence of God
:枝の教えは道すがら :Eda no oshie wa michisugara :The teachings of the branches are on the way
:根を知るまでの段階期 :Ne o shiru made no dankai-ki :A stage until one knows the root
:開闢以来の天啓道 :Kaibyaku irai no tenkei-dō :The way of revelation since the beginning of the world
:世界最後の元の声 :Sekai saigo no moto no koe :Is the final, original voice of the world
:天祖の教えは全哲理 :Tenso no oshie wa zen-tetsuri :The teaching of the Heavenly Ancestor is the entire philosophy
:神目的の証拠道 :Kami-mokuteki no shōko-michi :The way of proof of God's purpose
:すべてに神の型示す :Subete ni Kami no kata shimesu :In all things, the model of God is shown
:予言満載着実に :Yogen mansai chakujitsu ni :Steadily loaded with prophecies
:旬に応じた的中を :Shun ni ōjita tekichū o :Hitting the mark according to the right time
:示す尊き理のふしん :Shimesu tōtoki ri no fushin :Is the precious construction of principle that is shown
:惨たり道の沿革史 :San tari michi no enkaku-shi :The tragic history of the path
:苦難が実る黎明期 :Kunan ga minoru reimei-ki :Is the dawn when hardship bears fruit
:ひながた踏んだほんぶしん :Hinagata funda hon-bushin :The true construction that has followed the divine model
:死灰で死滅の世直しに :Shikai de shimetsu no yonaoshi ni :For the world-renewal from dead ashes
:既成の殻を打ち破る :Kisei no kara o uchiyaburu :Breaking the shell of the established order
:神おもわくの正解教 :Kami omowaku no seikai-kyō :Is the correct teaching of God's will
:道人没我でひのきしん :Michi-bito botsuga de hinokishin :The followers of the path, in selflessness, perform daily service
:神の世ゆえに神一条 :Kami no yo yue ni Kami ichijō :Because it is the world of God, it is God in a single line
:意義にめざめた正人間 :Igi ni mezameta sei-ningen :The true human being awakened to the meaning
:熱誠貫く神の使者 :Nessei tsuranuku Kami no shisha :Is a messenger of God who carries through with sincerity
:天理の大道打ち出して :Tenri no daidō uchidashite :Putting forth the great path of Heavenly Principle
:正当教理で世に先駆 :Seitō kyōri de yo ni senku :Pioneering the world with orthodox doctrine
:世にも珍し助けなす :Yo ni mo mezurashi tasuke nasu :Performing salvation, which is rare in the world
:神宿望の到達期 :Kami shukubō no tōtatsu-ki :Is the period of arrival of God's long-cherished desire
:理想実現初代には :Risō jitsugen shodai ni wa :In the first generation of the realization of the ideal
:神代初めの基盤なる :Kami-yo hajime no kiban naru :Is the foundation of the beginning of the age of the gods
:みろくぼさつの完全教 :Miroku Bosatsu no kanzen-kyō :The perfect teaching of Miroku Bosatsu (Maitreya Bodhisattva)
:元のふしんのみろくの世 :Moto no fushin no Miroku no yo :Is the world of Miroku of the original construction
:つとめの目当は甘露台 :Tsutome no medo wa Kanrodai :The aim of the service is the Kanrodai
:南無全世界済渡する :Namu zensekai saido suru :Adoration, saving the entire world
:不滅教えの発光体 :Fumetsu oshie no hakkō-tai :The luminous body of the immortal teaching
:神名代の元親本尊 :Kami myōdai no jiba-honzon :Is the original parent, the object of worship, the representative of God
:一れつ助けの元の親 :Ichiretsu tasuke no moto no oya :The original parent of the salvation of all
:全人類の真の親里 :Zen-jinrui no shin no sato :The true parental home of all humanity

{{moved from|Tenkei Okyōsho}} In September 1965, Ōnishi Tama composed '''''Tenkei Mikyōsho''''' ([[q:ja:大西玉#天啓御教書|天啓御教書]], "Book of Divine Revelations"), a 100-line poem explaining the core doctrines of the Honbushin religion. The poem is published in ''Uchū Hontairon'' (宇宙本体論, "Origin of the Universe"), a 1994 book that gives an overview of Honbushin beliefs. The "Overview" (総序) section, which is the book's first section, was written by Ōnishi Tama in June 1961; the third section of the book (すくい綱) was written by her in July 1964.<ref>Miroku みろく [Ōnishi Tama 大西玉] (1994-04-26). ''Uchū Hontairon'' 宇宙本体論. Plus One プラスワン出版社. ISBN 4-938753-90-1.</ref>
==Original text== (南無甘露台)
*物極不滅は神完全 ::陰陽自存の大精神 :宇宙の極は心のみ ::神独創の世の起源 :継続体系とり進む ::陰陽電気の力業
*真の自由は現実に ::根元自在の二神のみ :神はすべての因なりて ::われらの住居は結果境 :神人それぞれ本質は ::能動受動の電気にて :常にわれらは依存した ::力と力の対心形
*秩序は完全組織なリ ::万象すべては神の意志 :進化の歴史の指すところ ::神に目的ある証拠 :神の目的神中心 ::真の宗教羅針盤 :完全和合の西世界 ::神の理想の反射鏡
*人間理性の真意義は ::神の理想の理解なり :善悪是非の判別も ::神目的が正基準 :人生意義はここにあり ::建設努力が人の義務
*神こそわれらの真の父母 ::進化過程は根元に :われら育てる親心 ::示せる神の完全愛 :万差のわれら境遇は ::霊魂不減の証左なり
*心は霊の活動態 ::生とは新の旅にして :各自に応じた続き道 ::生活体の死の崩壊 :神訓育の中休み ::次生に備えた衣裳替え :すべては借物自体は無 ::刹那連続反応態
*運命宿命神の意図 ::知らでも目的コース行く :生死浮沈もことごとく ::各自を仕込む仕組みにて :神目的の部品なり ::神おもわくの個性づくり :人力無なり死が正体 ::心だけなる神の守護
*神の世界は理の支配 ::環境いっさい天の声 :目的物の全人間 ::互いに鏡で映り合う :自己が行為はみな還る ::善悪因果の訓育法 :神の摂理は完全綱 ::水も漏らさぬ理の裁き
*神は完全終始無し ::神の性格天理なり :天理に基づく理の指針 ::神の手段は神の価値 :全哲証拠神の型 ::いかなるものも破壊不可 :現象界に終始して ::神本質を知らざるの :枝の教えは道すがら ::根を知るまでの段階期
*開闢以来の天啓道 ::世界最後の元の声 :天祖の教えは全哲理 ::神目的の証拠道 :すべてに神の型示す ::予言満載着実に :旬に応じた的中を ::示す尊き理のふしん
*惨たり道の沿革史 ::苦難が実る黎明期 :ひながた踏んだほんぶしん ::死灰で死滅の世直しに :既成の殻を打ち破る ::神おもわくの正解教
*道人没我でひのきしん ::神の世ゆえに神一条 :意義にめざめた正人間 ::熱誠貫く神の使者 :天理の大道打ち出して ::正当教理で世に先駆 :世にも珍し助けなす ::神宿望の到達期
*理想実現初代には ::神代初めの基盤なる :みろくぼさつの完全教 ::元のふしんのみろくの世 :つとめの目当は甘露台 ::南無全世界済渡する
*不滅教えの発光体 ::神名代の元親本尊 :一れつ助けの元の親 ::全人類の真の親里

:陰陽自存の大精神 :In'yō jizon no dai-seishin :The great spirit of the self-existing yin and yang
:宇宙の極は心のみ :Uchū no kyoku wa kokoro nomi :The ultimate of the universe is only the mind/heart
:神独創の世の起源 :Kami dokusō no yo no kigen :The origin of the world is God's sole creation

:陰陽電気の力業 :In'yō denki no chikarawaza :The mighty work of the electricity of yin and yang
:真の自由は現実に :Shin no jiyū wa genjitsu ni :True freedom, in reality,
:根元自在の二神のみ :Kongen jizai no ni-shin nomi :Belongs only to the two gods of the origin, who are completely free
:神はすべての因なりて :Kami wa subete no in narite :God is the cause of all, and

:神名代の元親本尊 :Kami myōdai no jiba-honzon :Is the original parent, the object of worship, the representative of God
:一れつ助けの元の親 :Ichiretsu tasuke no moto no oya :The original parent of the salvation of all
:全人類の真の親里 :Zen-jinrui no shin no sato :The true parental home of all humanity

revision.text:
{{moved from|Tenkei Okyōsho}} In September 1965, Ōnishi Tama composed '''''Tenkei Mikyōsho''''' ([[q:ja:大西玉#天啓御教書|天啓御教書]], "Book of Divine Revelations"), a 100-line poem explaining the core doctrines of the Honbushin religion. The poem is published in ''Uchū Hontairon'' (宇宙本体論, "Origin of the Universe"), a 1994 book that gives an overview of Honbushin beliefs. The "Overview" (総序) section, which is the book's first section, was written by Ōnishi Tama in June 1961; the third section of the book (すくい綱) was written by her in July 1964.<ref>Miroku みろく [Ōnishi Tama 大西玉] (1994-04-26). ''Uchū Hontairon'' 宇宙本体論. Plus One プラスワン出版社. ISBN 4-938753-90-1.</ref>
==Original text== (南無甘露台)
*物極不滅は神完全 ::陰陽自存の大精神 :宇宙の極は心のみ ::神独創の世の起源 :継続体系とり進む ::陰陽電気の力業
*真の自由は現実に ::根元自在の二神のみ :神はすべての因なりて ::われらの住居は結果境 :神人それぞれ本質は ::能動受動の電気にて :常にわれらは依存した ::力と力の対心形
*秩序は完全組織なリ ::万象すべては神の意志 :進化の歴史の指すところ ::神に目的ある証拠 :神の目的神中心 ::真の宗教羅針盤 :完全和合の西世界 ::神の理想の反射鏡
*人間理性の真意義は ::神の理想の理解なり :善悪是非の判別も ::神目的が正基準 :人生意義はここにあり ::建設努力が人の義務
*神こそわれらの真の父母 ::進化過程は根元に :われら育てる親心 ::示せる神の完全愛 :万差のわれら境遇は ::霊魂不減の証左なり
*心は霊の活動態 ::生とは新の旅にして :各自に応じた続き道 ::生活体の死の崩壊 :神訓育の中休み ::次生に備えた衣裳替え :すべては借物自体は無 ::刹那連続反応態
*運命宿命神の意図 ::知らでも目的コース行く :生死浮沈もことごとく ::各自を仕込む仕組みにて :神目的の部品なり ::神おもわくの個性づくり :人力無なり死が正体 ::心だけなる神の守護
*神の世界は理の支配 ::環境いっさい天の声 :目的物の全人間 ::互いに鏡で映り合う :自己が行為はみな還る ::善悪因果の訓育法 :神の摂理は完全綱 ::水も漏らさぬ理の裁き
*神は完全終始無し ::神の性格天理なり :天理に基づく理の指針 ::神の手段は神の価値 :全哲証拠神の型 ::いかなるものも破壊不可 :現象界に終始して ::神本質を知らざるの :枝の教えは道すがら ::根を知るまでの段階期
*開闢以来の天啓道 ::世界最後の元の声 :天祖の教えは全哲理 ::神目的の証拠道 :すべてに神の型示す ::予言満載着実に :旬に応じた的中を ::示す尊き理のふしん
*惨たり道の沿革史 ::苦難が実る黎明期 :ひながた踏んだほんぶしん ::死灰で死滅の世直しに :既成の殻を打ち破る ::神おもわくの正解教
*道人没我でひのきしん ::神の世ゆえに神一条 :意義にめざめた正人間 ::熱誠貫く神の使者 :天理の大道打ち出して ::正当教理で世に先駆 :世にも珍し助けなす ::神宿望の到達期
*理想実現初代には ::神代初めの基盤なる :みろくぼさつの完全教 ::元のふしんのみろくの世 :つとめの目当は甘露台 ::南無全世界済渡する
*不滅教えの発光体 ::神名代の元親本尊 :一れつ助けの元の親 ::全人類の真の親里
==Intelinear English translation== (Google Gemini 2.5 Pro translation; please check for errors and improvements)
;天啓御教書 :''Tenkei Mikyōsho'' :"The Revelatory Divine Teachings"
:物極不滅は神完全 :Butsu kyoku fu-metsu wa Kami kanzen :That which reaches the ultimate and does not perish is God's perfection
:陰陽自存の大精神 :In'yō jizon no dai-seishin :The great spirit of the self-existing yin and yang
:宇宙の極は心のみ :Uchū no kyoku wa kokoro nomi :The ultimate of the universe is only the mind/heart
:神独創の世の起源 :Kami dokusō no yo no kigen :The origin of the world is God's sole creation
:継続体系とり進む :Keizoku taikei tori susumu :Proceeding by means of a continuous system
:陰陽電気の力業 :In'yō denki no chikarawaza :The mighty work of the electricity of yin and yang
:真の自由は現実に :Shin no jiyū wa genjitsu ni :True freedom, in reality,
:根元自在の二神のみ :Kongen jizai no ni-shin nomi :Belongs only to the two gods of the origin, who are completely free
:神はすべての因なりて :Kami wa subete no in narite :God is the cause of all, and
:われらの住居は結果境 :Warera no suma-i wa kekka-kyō :Our dwelling is the realm of effect
:神人それぞれ本質は :Kami-hito sorezore honshitsu wa :The essence of God and humans, respectively, is
:能動受動の電気にて :Nōdō judō no denki nite :The electricity of activeness and passiveness
:常にわれらは依存した :Tsune ni warera wa izon shita :We have always been dependent
:力と力の対心形 :Chikara to chikara no tai-shin-kei :On the opposing forms of power and power
:秩序は完全組織なリ :Chitsujo wa kanzen soshiki nari :Order is a perfect system
:万象すべては神の意志 :Banshō subete wa Kami no ishi :All phenomena are the will of God
:進化の歴史の指すところ :Shinka no rekishi no sasu tokoro :What the history of evolution points to
:神に目的ある証拠 :Kami ni mokuteki aru shōko :Is proof that God has a purpose
:神の目的神中心 :Kami no mokuteki Kami chūshin :God's purpose is God-centered
:真の宗教羅針盤 :Shin no shūkyō rashinban :The compass of true religion
:完全和合の西世界 :Kanzen wagō no nishi-sekai :The Western world of perfect harmony
:神の理想の反射鏡 :Kami no risō no hanshakyō :Is the reflecting mirror of God's ideal
:人間理性の真意義は :Ningen risei no shin'igi wa :The true meaning of human reason
:神の理想の理解なり :Kami no risō no rikai nari :Is the understanding of God's ideal
:善悪是非の判別も :Zen'aku zehi no hanbetsu mo :The discernment of good and evil, right and wrong,
:神目的が正基準 :Kami-mokuteki ga sei-kijun :Has God's purpose as its correct standard
:人生意義はここにあり :Jinsei igi wa koko ni ari :The meaning of life is here
:建設努力が人の義務 :Kensetsu doryoku ga hito no gimu :The effort of construction is the duty of man
:神こそわれらの真の父母 :Kami koso warera no shin no fubo :God is our true parent
:進化過程は根元に :Shinka katei wa kongen ni :The process of evolution, at its root,
:われら育てる親心 :Warera sodateru oya-gokoro :Is the parental heart that nurtures us
:示せる神の完全愛 :Shimeseru Kami no kanzen-ai :The manifested perfect love of God
:万差のわれら境遇は :Bansa no warera kyōgū wa :Our myriad different circumstances
:霊魂不減の証左なり :Reikon fu-metsu no shōsa nari :Are proof of the indestructibility of the soul
:心は霊の活動態 :Kokoro wa rei no katsudō-tai :The mind is the active state of the spirit
:生とは新の旅にして :Sei to wa kokoro no tabi ni shite :Life is a new journey
:各自に応じた続き道 :Kakuji ni ōjita tsuzuki-michi :A continuous path according to each individual
:生活体の死の崩壊 :Seikatsu-tai no shi no hōkai :The collapse of the living body at death
:神訓育の中休み :Kami kun'iku no nakayasumi :Is a brief rest in God's training
:次生に備えた衣裳替え :Jisei ni sonaeta ishōgae :A change of clothes in preparation for the next life
:すべては借物自体は無 :Subete wa karimono jitai wa mu :Everything is a borrowed thing; in itself, it is nothing
:刹那連続反応態 :Setsuna renzoku hannō-tai :A continuous state of momentary reactions
:運命宿命神の意図 :Unmei shukumei Kami no ito :Fate and destiny are God's intention
:知らでも目的コース行く :Shirade mo mokuteki kōsu yuku :Even without knowing it, we follow the course of purpose
:生死浮沈もことごとく :Seishi fuchin mo kotogotoku :Life and death, ups and downs, all of it
:各自を仕込む仕組みにて :Kakuji o shikomu shikumi nite :Is a mechanism for training each individual
:神目的の部品なり :Kami-mokuteki no buhin nari :We are parts of God's purpose
:神おもわくの個性づくり :Kami omowaku no saga-zukuri :The creation of individuality according to God's will
:人力無なり死が正体 :Jinryoku mu nari shi ga shōtai :Human power is nothing; death is its true nature
:心だけなる神の守護 :Kokoro dake naru Kami no shugo :Only the mind/heart is God's protection
:神の世界は理の支配 :Kami no sekai wa ri no shihai :The world of God is the dominion of reason/principle
:環境いっさい天の声 :Kankyō issai Ten no koe :The entire environment is the voice of Heaven
:目的物の全人間 :Mokuteki-butsu no zen-ningen :All human beings, the objects of the purpose
:互いに鏡で映り合う :Tagai ni kagami de utsuri-au :Reflect each other in a mirror
:自己が行為はみな還る :Ono ga kōi wa mina kaeru :One's own actions all return
:善悪因果の訓育法 :Zen'aku inga no kun'iku-hō :The training method of cause and effect of good and evil
:神の摂理は完全綱 :Kami no setsuri wa kanzen-mō :God's providence is a perfect web
:水も漏らさぬ理の裁き :Mizu mo morasanu ri no sabaki :The judgment of principle that lets no water leak
:神は完全終始無し :Kami wa kanzen shūshi nashi :God is perfect, without beginning or end
:神の性格天理なり :Kami no seikaku Tenri nari :The nature of God is Heavenly Principle
:天理に基づく理の指針 :Tenri ni motozuku ri no shishin :The guidance of principle based on Heavenly Principle
:神の手段は神の価値 :Kami no tedate wa Kami no kachi :God's means are God's values
:全哲証拠神の型 :Zen-tetsu shōko Kami no kata :The proof of all philosophy is the model of God
:いかなるものも破壊不可 :Ikanaru mono mo hakai fuka :Which cannot be destroyed by anything
:現象界に終始して :Genshō-kai ni shūshi shite :To be engrossed in the phenomenal world
:神本質を知らざるの :Kami-honshitsu o shirazaru no :And not know the essence of God
:枝の教えは道すがら :Eda no oshie wa michisugara :The teachings of the branches are on the way
:根を知るまでの段階期 :Ne o shiru made no dankai-ki :A stage until one knows the root
:開闢以来の天啓道 :Kaibyaku irai no tenkei-dō :The way of revelation since the beginning of the world
:世界最後の元の声 :Sekai saigo no moto no koe :Is the final, original voice of the world
:天祖の教えは全哲理 :Tenso no oshie wa zen-tetsuri :The teaching of the Heavenly Ancestor is the entire philosophy
:神目的の証拠道 :Kami-mokuteki no shōko-michi :The way of proof of God's purpose
:すべてに神の型示す :Subete ni Kami no kata shimesu :In all things, the model of God is shown
:予言満載着実に :Yogen mansai chakujitsu ni :Steadily loaded with prophecies
:旬に応じた的中を :Shun ni ōjita tekichū o :Hitting the mark according to the right time
:示す尊き理のふしん :Shimesu tōtoki ri no fushin :Is the precious construction of principle that is shown
:惨たり道の沿革史 :San tari michi no enkaku-shi :The tragic history of the path
:苦難が実る黎明期 :Kunan ga minoru reimei-ki :Is the dawn when hardship bears fruit
:ひながた踏んだほんぶしん :Hinagata funda hon-bushin :The true construction that has followed the divine model
:死灰で死滅の世直しに :Shikai de shimetsu no yonaoshi ni :For the world-renewal from dead ashes
:既成の殻を打ち破る :Kisei no kara o uchiyaburu :Breaking the shell of the established order
:神おもわくの正解教 :Kami omowaku no seikai-kyō :Is the correct teaching of God's will
:道人没我でひのきしん :Michi-bito botsuga de hinokishin :The followers of the path, in selflessness, perform daily service
:神の世ゆえに神一条 :Kami no yo yue ni Kami ichijō :Because it is the world of God, it is God in a single line
:意義にめざめた正人間 :Igi ni mezameta sei-ningen :The true human being awakened to the meaning
:熱誠貫く神の使者 :Nessei tsuranuku Kami no shisha :Is a messenger of God who carries through with sincerity
:天理の大道打ち出して :Tenri no daidō uchidashite :Putting forth the great path of Heavenly Principle
:正当教理で世に先駆 :Seitō kyōri de yo ni senku :Pioneering the world with orthodox doctrine
:世にも珍し助けなす :Yo ni mo mezurashi tasuke nasu :Performing salvation, which is rare in the world
:神宿望の到達期 :Kami shukubō no tōtatsu-ki :Is the period of arrival of God's long-cherished desire
:理想実現初代には :Risō jitsugen shodai ni wa :In the first generation of the realization of the ideal
:神代初めの基盤なる :Kami-yo hajime no kiban naru :Is the foundation of the beginning of the age of the gods
:みろくぼさつの完全教 :Miroku Bosatsu no kanzen-kyō :The perfect teaching of Miroku Bosatsu (Maitreya Bodhisattva)
:元のふしんのみろくの世 :Moto no fushin no Miroku no yo :Is the world of Miroku of the original construction
:つとめの目当は甘露台 :Tsutome no medo wa Kanrodai :The aim of the service is the Kanrodai
:南無全世界済渡する :Namu zensekai saido suru :Adoration, saving the entire world
:不滅教えの発光体 :Fumetsu oshie no hakkō-tai :The luminous body of the immortal teaching
:神名代の元親本尊 :Kami myōdai no jiba-honzon :Is the original parent, the object of worship, the representative of God
:一れつ助けの元の親 :Ichiretsu tasuke no moto no oya :The original parent of the salvation of all
:全人類の真の親里 :Zen-jinrui no shin no sato :The true parental home of all humanity

{{moved from|Tenkei Okyōsho}} In September 1965, Ōnishi Tama composed '''''Tenkei Mikyōsho''''' ([[q:ja:大西玉#天啓御教書|天啓御教書]], "Book of Divine Revelations"), a 100-line poem explaining the core doctrines of the Honbushin religion. The poem is published in ''Uchū Hontairon'' (宇宙本体論, "Origin of the Universe"), a 1994 book that gives an overview of Honbushin beliefs. The "Overview" (総序) section, which is the book's first section, was written by Ōnishi Tama in June 1961; the third section of the book (すくい綱) was written by her in July 1964.<ref>Miroku みろく [Ōnishi Tama 大西玉] (1994-04-26). ''Uchū Hontairon'' 宇宙本体論. Plus One プラスワン出版社. ISBN 4-938753-90-1.</ref>

*神の世界は理の支配 ::環境いっさい天の声 :目的物の全人間 ::互いに鏡で映り合う :自己が行為はみな還る ::善悪因果の訓育法 :神の摂理は完全綱 ::水も漏らさぬ理の裁き

*開闢以来の天啓道 ::世界最後の元の声 :天祖の教えは全哲理 ::神目的の証拠道 :すべてに神の型示す ::予言満載着実に :旬に応じた的中を ::示す尊き理のふしん
